summary: Sprint B testing complete — Zone/Division Hierarchy + Divisional Admin Role + Health Explorer Division Mode. One critical bug found and fixed in api.js _uid() helper. Backend: 19/19 pytest pass. Frontend: All features verified end-to-end. DA001 test user created and validated.

ui_bugs.issue: Line 828: role group render list is ['superadmin', 'admin', 'reporting_officer', 'approving_supervisor', 'supervisor'] — MISSING 'divisional_admin'. DA users created via UI won't appear in the Users tab list (they exist in DB but are invisible in the Users tab).

action_items: AdminPage.js line 828: Add 'divisional_admin' to the roles array so DA users appear in the Users tab list: ['superadmin', 'divisional_admin', 'admin', 'reporting_officer', 'approving_supervisor', 'supervisor']
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: api.js _uid() — was reading user.id but login response stores _id. All Zone/Division CRUD was returning 403 SuperAdmin required. Fixed to: `const u = JSON.parse(...); return u._id || u.id || ''`
AdminPage.js L828: divisional_admin missing from Users tab role group rendering — DA users not visible in Users tab list
zones_divisions.py: division delete correctly blocks if stations assigned or DA users assigned (409). Zone delete blocks if divisions exist. Good defensive checks.
_filter_assets_for_user correctly scopes divisional_admin by station.division_id — verified working
health_explorer.py mode=division L1 groups by station.division_id → gets correct division row for DHN

success_rate.frontend: 95% — all Sprint B features verified; 1 minor UX issue (DA users not visible in Users tab)

test_credentials.DA001: admin123 — Divisional Admin (Dhanbad Division) — created during this test run

seed_data_creation: DA001 user (role=divisional_admin, assigned_division_id=Dhanbad Division) was created during testing. It remains in the DB for future tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint B complete. Zone/Division hierarchy fully implemented and tested. ECR zone + Dhanbad Division auto-created at startup. All 31 stations tagged with division_id. Health Explorer 'By Division' mode works (SA only). Key fix: _uid() in api.js now reads u._id || u.id. DA001 user created (role=divisional_admin, Dhanbad Division). Key testids: tab-zones, tab-divisions, zone-name-input, zone-code-input, zone-submit-button, division-name-input, division-code-input, division-zone-select, division-submit-button, he-mode-division, station-division-select, user-role-select, user-division-select. Minor: divisional_admin users not shown in Users tab (AdminPage.js line 828 missing 'divisional_admin' from roles array).
rca_of_issues: Root Cause: api.js _uid() helper function reads `user.id` but backend serialize_doc keeps MongoDB _id as `_id` key (not renamed). Login response returns {_id: '...'} not {id: '...'}. Result: _uid() returned empty string, causing current_user_id='' in Zone/Division API calls, which then hit _require_superadmin check and returned 403. Fix: read `u._id || u.id` to handle both field name variants.
